creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Subject: CVE-2022-22720: HTTP request smuggling vulnerability in Apache
 HTTP Server 2.4.52 and earlier 
From: Stefan Eissing <icing@apache.org>
Date: Mon, 14 Mar 2022 10:08:35 +0000 (03:08 PDT)
To: announce@apache.org, dev@httpd.apache.org

	(text/plain)
(Unknown charset: <utf-8>)

Severity: important

Description:

Apache HTTP Server 2.4.52 and earlier fails to close inbound connection when errors are encountered discarding the request body, exposing the server to HTTP Request Smuggling

Credit:

James Kettle <james.kettle portswigger.net>
